titleStmt.title: SII 27.406: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 406. (A.R. No. 23 of 1930-38.) ŚRĪRAṄGAM, TRICHINOPOLY TALUK, TRICHINOPOLY DISTRICT.

summary.p: East wall of the second prākāra of the Raṅganāthaswami temple.
This record registers a gift of land made after purchase for 25 varāhas, for supplying garlands, coconuts, betel-leaves etc., to the god by Chikka Narasaṇa-nāyaka, son of a nāyaka.

It is dated the cyclic year Dundubhi, Kārttika śu. 15, Wednesday, lunar eclipse. On palaeographical grounds it may be assigned to about the 15th century. The details probably correspond to 1502 A.D., October 15, when the lunar eclipse occurred a Saturday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī duṁdubhiya saṁvatsarada kārtika śu 15 bu sōmagrahaṇa puṁṇya kāladali nāyakara komāracikkanarasaṇanāyakaru śrīraṁgadēvarige hovinadaṁḍe kāyituppayali . tamaccanammurage
mēlōgara bāḷehaṁṇu ṭheṁginakāya sēvege payiru māḍuUdakke kramavāgi yippattaAyidu varahage koṁḍa staḷava yinū koṭṭudu veṁkaṭammanavara
drārkkasthāyiĀgi naḍaudu
jaggayya cinataggali danavāSome space is
cina lekkadamana
Digital edition of SII 27.406 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
